name: scopeDeactivateTrigger
title: scopeDeactivateTrigger
description: Performs Deactivate Trigger action for Scope Window. This action is equivalent to deactivating the trigger via the GUI.
The completion of this action is reported with an internal event which can be awaited via TFS-function testWaitForScopeEvent() in CAPL programs for test modules.
return: 2 (success): Trigger is already inactive. This might be a case when the trigger has been deactivated by a previous CAPL call or manually.
